      Next
      Search: The first route segment is safe enough to read.
    
  
    
      Pressure
      Quiet for now. The floor is readable, but it will not stay that way.
    
  
    
      Threat
      Rescue The Captive: 3 guards remain in the objective room.
    
  
    
      
    
      T1
      You descend to Vermin Halls - depth 1.
    
  
    
      T1
      Orange marks the floor objective on the map. Clear it, use U on the marker when the room is ready, then choose between stairs up or one greedy detour.
    
  
    
      T1
      Someone is still alive below. Reach them before the floor tightens around you.
    
  
    
      T1
      Vermin Halls: Vermin Halls - depth 1.
    
  
    
      T1
      A cold draft whispers through the keep. Someone once fled these halls and did not make it out.
    
  
    
      T1
      The first route segment is safe enough to read.
    
  
    
      T1
      The first halls still show the path of someone who tried to flee the keep.
    
  
    
      T1
      Room opens. Feature: Stairs up.
    
  
    
      T1
      Open one town door to see what town can do. Then follow the north road straight into the keep.
    
  
    
      T1
      Recover the Runestone of the Winds from the lower halls and return to town.
    
  
    
      T1
      Morgan enters the valley beneath the ruined keep.
